title: stenostephanus guerrerensis
intro: Stenostephanus guerrerensis, also known as Hierba del Venado, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Acanthaceae family, characterized by its woody stem and fragrant leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and antiseptic properties. Stenostephanus guerrerensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
